name: laboratoire-local
description: Local marketplace for project-specific Claude Code plugins authored inside the laboratoire monorepo. Not intended for public distribution — install via /plugin marketplace add <abs-path-to-this-dir>.

plugins.name: orchestrator
plugins.description: Task classification + AgentHub team assembly skill, scoped to this repo's stack (Next.js 16 + Vite SPAs + HeroUI/Tailwind v4 + pnpm/Turbo monorepo).
